title: Hot Biscuits - Part 1
description:
Some of you kids might have to study To Kill a Mockingbird for an english class, but you don't want to READ! That's booooring, man. Well don't worry, I've got your back. I've pretty much summarized the entire novel/film for you in this short, easy to digest video. Amaze your teachers with details even they might have overlooked!

Sadly, this project was originally ~6 minutes in length, and a joint effort between myself and Svenboogie. His parts were a lot funnier than mine.
However, he mysteriously vanished as we were nearing completion about 2 months ago, so I just kind of scraped up what I had so far and... here we are.
